_comment: Schema reference for the polling payload returned by the Google Apps Script Web App (apps-script/Code.gs). The script selects one recommendation (sequential or random) and returns these flat fields. static_data in src/settings.yml mirrors this shape for local preview.
rec_title: Make a Splash at the Lagoon
rec_body: Your stay includes full Desert Color access — a 2.5-acre lagoon with sandy beaches just a short walk from the door.
